name: manyrows-appkit
description: Embedded auth runtime for ManyRows installs. Built as a self-contained IIFE bundle (React + CSS inlined) and served from ${install}/appkit/assets/appkit.js. NOT published to npm — `private: true` is intentional. Customers consume it via @manyrows/appkit-react, which injects a <script> tag pointing at the install's hosted bundle and reads window.ManyRows.AppKit. See README.md.
